title: Performance Marketing Manager (m/w/d) - Fokus SEA & Webanalyse
required_skills: SEA campaign management (Google Ads, Microsoft Advertising) — 2–3 years hands-on
Google Tag Manager + data streams & feed management
bonus_skills: AI / platform feature testing for SEA efficiency
matched_skills: Attribution & ROI analytics (campaign ROI, programme attribution at HSBC)
Data quality, tracking & QA (partial overlap with tracking setup)

Attribution and ROI analytics experience (HSBC programme analytics, campaign ROI measurement)
Funnel & conversion analysis as proxy for customer journey understanding
